name: Kashmiri Rogan Josh
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the fennel seeds until fine.
2. Put the yoghurt in a bowl and beat it with a fork until smooth and creamy.
3. Heat the oil in a large pot over high heat. When hot, put in the cinnamon and cloves.
4. Add the ground asafetida. Then add all the meat and salt. Stir and cook, still on high heat for about 5 minutes.
5. Put in the paprika and cayenne and stir well. Slowly add the yoghurt a little at a time, stirring vigorously to incorporate it into the meat.
6. Add all the yoghurt this way. Continue cooking on high heat until all liquid has boiled away and the meat pieces have browned slightly.
7. Add the fennel and ginger. Stir again to combine.
8. Put in the water or broth, cover with a lid left slightly ajar, and cook on medium heat for 30 minutes.
9. Cover completely and cook on low heat for another 45 minutes or until the meat is tender.
10. Stir a few times as it cooks to ensure there's always some liquid in the pot.
11. Remove the lid and add the garam masala. Adjust with boiling off any excess liquid if needed, resulting in a thick, reddish-brown sauce.
